decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly generate mana through cards like Priest of Titania and Gaea's Cradle, while utilizing Quirion Ranger and Wirewood Symbiote to untap creatures for additional mana. The deck also aims to efficiently search for key creatures with Survival of the Fittest and generate card advantage with Sylvan Library. With a high creature count and strong mana acceleration, this Elf-based aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with an early onslaught of creatures and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's plays with counterspells and removal spells like Swords to Plowshares. It aims to slow down the game until it can establish a strong board presence with lands like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave, while also utilizing cards like Parallax Tide and Propaganda to further control the pace of the game. The deck also includes card draw spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Portent to maintain card advantage and outvalue the opponent in the long run.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive goblin tribal strategy. By using cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Ringleader to quickly put goblins onto the battlefield, along with powerful support cards like Goblin Warchief and Siege-Gang Commander, this deck aims to quickly build a threatening board presence and deal damage to the opponent before they can stabilize. Additional removal spells like Disenchant and Gempalm Incinerator help to clear the way for the goblin horde to attack unimpeded.

The deck revolves around utilizing a combination of card draw, removal, and countermagic to control the game and protect the powerful creature, Psychatog. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to build up card advantage, dig for key pieces, and ultimately win through the evasive and threatening Psychatog. The inclusion of various instant speed card draw spells like Opt, Portent, and Accumulated Knowledge allows for flexibility and the ability to dig deeper into the deck for answers or threats.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of goblins, using creatures like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to get more goblins onto the battlefield. Cards like Goblin King and Goblin Warchief provide buffs to all goblins, while cards like Goblin Piledriver and Siege-Gang Commander pack a powerful punch. Gempalm Incinerator can clear the way by dealing damage to creatures, while Rishadan Port can disrupt the opponent's mana base. This deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain a strong board presence throughout the game.

The key concept of this deck is to control the game through counterspells, removal, and cards that prevent opponents from advancing their game plan. The deck aims to gradually build advantage by using cards like Standstill and Fact or Fiction to draw into more answers while slowly locking down the opponent's board through cards like Humility and Mishra's Factory. By maintaining control over the game and disrupting the opponent's strategy, the deck can eventually win through efficient use of removal and powerful finishers like Decree of Justice.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat while disrupting the opponent's game plan with countermagic and card filtering. By efficiently using cards like Foil, Counterspell, and Chain of Vapor, the deck aims to protect its combo pieces and ensure victory through a swift and decisive play. With a focus on speed and disruption, the deck aims to control the game and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful combo potential.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up land destruction and aggressive creatures in order to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Terravore, Nimble Mongoose, and Call of the Herd, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent while disrupting their mana base with cards like Wasteland and Armageddon. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and Rishadan Port further enhances the deck's ability to control the board and maintain tempo. Overall, the deck's strategy revolves around efficiently managing resources and maintaining a fast-paced offense to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive, efficient creatures and disruptive spells in order to control the game and secure a quick victory. By using cards like Cabal Therapy, Duress, and Hypnotic Specter to disrupt the opponent's hand, and cards like Nantuko Shade and Ravenous Rats to apply pressure on the board, this Mono Black Aggro deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. With cards like Dark Ritual and Wasteland to accelerate mana and disrupt the opponent's resources, this deck aims to control the game and secure victory through aggression and disruption.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a horde of aggressive Goblin creatures. By utilizing abilities like Goblin Lackey to put Goblins into play for free and Goblin Warchief to make them cheaper, this deck can swarm the board early and deal damage fast. The inclusion of cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Gempalm Incinerator provides additional firepower and removal, while cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, this deck aims to maintain pressure and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize the interaction between Stifle and Phyrexian Dreadnought to create a powerful combo that can quickly take control of the game. By using counterspells and other disruption spells to protect the combo pieces, the deck aims to stall the opponent while setting up the combo win condition. Card draw and manipulation spells like Gush, Portent, and Impulse help to find the necessary pieces for the combo, while Mishra's Factory provides a backup win condition if needed.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures. It utilizes cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly get Goblins onto the battlefield, supported by Goblin Warchief to make them cheaper. Cards like Goblin Piledriver and Siege-Gang Commander provide extra punch, while Gempalm Incinerator helps clear the way for attacks. The mana base is designed for consistent access to all colors needed for the deck, and Disenchant provides some removal options. Overall, this deck aims to win the game quickly through aggressive creature-based strategies.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively play powerful creatures like Arrogant Wurm and Basking Rootwalla with the help of Madness cards like Circular Logic and Wild Mongrel. The deck also focuses on utilizing Survival of the Fittest to search for and discard cards that can be used for additional benefits. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures, counterspells, and card advantage through the Madness mechanic.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize Oath of Druids to cheat powerful creatures into play, such as Terravore and Sylvan Library. The deck aims to control the game through disruptive cards like Wasteland and Swords to Plowshares, while also utilizing land destruction spells like Thermokarst and Winter's Grasp to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The deck also includes efficient mana ramp like Mox Diamond and efficient beaters like Mishra's Factory and Treetop Village to apply pressure and close out the game.

The deck is focused on quickly dealing damage to the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It includes efficient one-drop creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast to finish off the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Price of Progress to pressure the opponent and prevent them from stabilizing. With a low mana curve and a focus on speed and efficiency, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish a strong defense.

The deck revolves around a powerful combo utilizing cards like Replenish, Opalescence, and Parallax Wave/Tide to overwhelm the opponent. By filling the graveyard with enchantments using cards like Frantic Search and Attunement, the player can bring back a large number of enchantments onto the battlefield at once with Replenish. Opalescence then turns all enchantments into creature, while Parallax Wave/Tide can manipulate the number of enchantments on the battlefield to control the opponent's board. Additionally, the deck includes control elements like Swords to Plowshares and Mana Leak to protect the combo.
